title: Terrible Mouse
description: You have a good eye for choosing this hospital.
body:
### <center> 🐭 About the Terrible Mouse 🐭 <center>

This mod is based on the horror YouTube series Terrible Mouse, created by Gutian.

### <center> 🐭 What's in the Mod 🐭 <center>

☠️ Dangerous mobs will now appear in your world. It's best not to fight them without proper equipment.

![New Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d392bd7b0b9151e49daa23a4307f3a91174d246_0.webp)

🌲 A new type of tree will begin to generate in the **Snowy Plains** biome in the world.

![Dead snow covered tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae4b13b2faa5aa9f54f13fcf30b0e5c5db2745d5_0.webp)
![Dead snow covered blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81168e0d405ca2eaa8654e43aee44f63a665add8_0.webp)

🚪 New types of decorative doors can be made from this wood.

![New doors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d2fe823adaa9f8b3e119c7da2010b19af179e9a_0.webp)

⛺ New structure in the **Forest** biome.

![New structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9045340f1bd8d6fc07d46513250f77f2410007de.jpeg)

💎 Items and weapons.

![New items and weapon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f80490a251d118ba9ef53d9e5530c0b2c898f424.jpeg)

🧱 Blocks.

![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6c65c6e151fa91e71d5d759d08062ea0472654a_0.webp)

⚗️ New crafting station.

![New craft station](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d77eb816371e222f0f6ca849e6cf57a337055087_0.webp)
![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06ba6f1f48a262a5a379e9a586e369ee1d018e5b_0.webp)

🖌️ Paintings.

![Paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94070989ad4193374c037be3696ad0f8971007fa.jpeg)
